overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game showing a cowboy character riding a horse through a grassy wilderness valley illuminated by a lantern. The character dismounts approximately halfway through and continues walking alongside the horse toward distant rocky cliffs.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through the grassy terrain at a steady trot, holding the reins while a lantern illuminates the path ahead

notable_agents.action: horse carrying the rider through the meadow, moving at a steady pace

entered.detail: large illuminated cliff face visible in the distance against the night sky
dense cluster of pine trees lining the left side of the valley
scattered pine trees on the right hillside
narrow waterway running parallel to the path on the left side
tall grass covering the ground illuminated by the lantern light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following a rider on horseback traversing a wide grassy valley at night. The scene is illuminated by a lantern casting a warm glow on the dirt trail, with rocky cliffs visible in the distant center and pine trees framing the sides. A creek runs along the left side of the path as the horse maintains a steady trot through the open terrain.

events.description: character dismounts the horse and begins walking alongside it

agents.ego_description: walking on foot alongside the horse, leading it forward through the grass toward the distant cliffs

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character, matching their pace

entered.detail: cluster of medium-sized boulders appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: After dismounting, the character walks alongside the horse through the continuing grassy valley. The camera follows from behind as they approach the rocky cliffs in the distance. The creek and large boulders from the previous section fall behind, while scattered rocks appear on the left. The pine trees on the left side grow closer as the character maintains a steady walking pace with the horse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime wilderness valley that shifts from a rhythmic ride on horseback to a steady walk toward distant cliffs. It begins by trailing a rider on a dirt path, where a lantern casts a warm glow over a wide grassy expanse framed by pine trees and a creek running along the left. As the character dismounts, the camera maintains its position from behind, transitioning the pace from a trot to a walk alongside the horse. The scene then shifts as the creek and large boulders recede into the distance, replaced by scattered rocks and pine trees that draw closer on the left. Finally, the movement continues across the open terrain, steadily closing the gap toward the rocky cliffs looming in the center of the horizon.
